title: Build a MUD (Multi-User Dungeon)
description: Build a Multi-User Dungeon — a text-based online world where multiple players connect simultaneously via TCP, explore rooms, chat, trade items, and fight monsters. Combines networking, threading, databases, OOP, and text parsing into a complete online game.
final_description: A complete MUD with a TCP server handling concurrent players, a rich room/zone system, NPC scripting, real-time chat channels, item trading between players, monster spawning and combat, SQLite character persistence, an admin command system, and a telnet-compatible text protocol — built across 10 chapters.
